angle: Passive income quietly turned into a second shift. Hububb gives the side-hustle host their evenings back without losing a booking.
brief: Marketer static batch, concept 1 of 8 (HUB_JUL_MAR_SECONDJOB), POV relatable, full-bleed take. Pillar: relief, funnel: convert, angle: second-job / day-reclaimed. Audience: side-hustle host, 2-3 flats plus a full-time job, London. Spotlight: the evening off-the-clock photo full bleed under the scrim, two-tone headline, CTA pill, proof chip as footer. Paid-ad candidate.

copy.headline: Get your evenings back
copy.subhead: Messages answered, cleaning booked, pricing tuned while you are off the clock.

social.primaryText:
Two flats. A full-time job. And a phone that never stops. It was supposed to be passive income, not a second shift.

Hububb is the autonomous AI host that runs your property end to end. Guest messages answered automatically in your voice, cleaners dispatched the moment a guest checks out, nightly pricing adjusted to demand, while you keep the control, the reviews and your Superhost status.

Connect your Airbnb in one click and it is set up in under fifteen minutes. Run one listing in parallel first, and move more over only when it is earning. £35 a month per unit, everything included.
